description_long: This is an irregularly shaped, medium-sized rock with a rough, granular surface and a light brown to tan coloration. The rock features a variety of protrusions and indentations, giving it a rugged, natural appearance. Its texture appears coarse, with visible grains and small cavities scattered across its surface. The coloration is mostly uniform but includes subtle variations in shade, likely due to mineral composition. The rock's form is asymmetrical, with one side appearing more elongated and pointed, while the opposite side is broader and flatter. It resembles rocks commonly found in landscaped urban parks or as natural barriers along sidewalks and pathways.
description: A rugged, light brown rock with a coarse, granular surface and irregular, asymmetrical shape. Its surface is marked by protrusions, indentations, and subtle color variations.
description_view_0: This view shows the broadest, flattest face of the rock, highlighting its rough texture and granular surface.
description_view_1: This angle reveals a more pointed, angular end with pronounced protrusions and a steeper profile.
description_view_2: The rock appears elongated from this side, with a visible ridge running along its length and a mix of rough and pitted textures.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the narrowest, most tapered end of the rock, showing a compact, pointed profile.
attribute_location: urban park landscaping or roadside barrier
